name: MoneyBack+ Credit Card

specialSpendRules.notes: Grocery spends earn CashPoints capped at 1,000 CashPoints per calendar month.
Utility spends earn CashPoints capped at 2,000 CashPoints per calendar month.
UPI transactions on the RuPay variant earn 2 CashPoints for every ₹200 spent (same as the base rate).

joiningBenefitsValued.label: 500 CashPoints upon payment of the joining fee

joiningBenefits: 500 CashPoints upon payment of the joining fee

milestones.label: Gift voucher worth ₹500 on spends of ₹50,000 per calendar quarter

milestoneBenefits: Gift voucher worth ₹500 on spends of ₹50,000 per calendar quarter
additionalBenefits: 1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions between ₹400 and ₹5,000, capped at ₹250 per statement cycle
10% additional discount on Swiggy Dineout using coupon code HDFCCARDS
Up to 50 days interest-free credit period from the date of purchase
Zero lost card liability when reported immediately
additionalDetails: CashPoints are posted on a calendar-month basis, with settled transactions from the 1st to the 30th/31st posted in the first week of the subsequent calendar month
Reward points on grocery transactions are capped at 1,000 CashPoints per calendar month
Reward points on utility spends are capped at 2,000 CashPoints per calendar month
Redemption of CashPoints against Flights and Hotels via SmartBuy is capped at 50,000 per month, up to 50% of the booking value
Redemption of CashPoints against product catalogue vouchers is capped up to 70% of voucher value
Cashback redemptions against statement balance are capped at 3,000 CashPoints per calendar month, with a minimum required balance of 500 CashPoints
Unredeemed CashPoints expire after 2 years of accumulation
CashPoints cannot be transferred to partner airlines or hotel loyalty programs
internalNotes: The 10X row covers only Amazon, Flipkart, Swiggy, so it is categorized 'amazon, partner merchants' rather than the broad 'amazon, dining, online' (which made it rank #4 for best dining card). Amazon keeps full direct credit; online (Flipkart/Swiggy) blends at acceleratedShare 0.25 against base; Swiggy is no longer credited as broad dining.
Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-07
Official audit completed on 2026-06-07 using HDFC Bank MoneyBack+ product page and FAQs.
HDFC Bank charges a revised 1.75% DCC markup fee (effective 15 May 2026) on all transactions processed in INR at international locations or with merchants registered overseas.
10X CashPoints (capped at 2,500/month) on Amazon, Flipkart, Swiggy, Reliance Smart SuperStore & BigBasket.
Base rate: 2 CashPoints per ₹200 spent on other spends. RuPay variant UPI transactions earn at base rate.
Grocery spends are capped at 1,000 CashPoints/month.
Utility spends are capped at 2,000 CashPoints/month.
Insurance spends do not earn reward points.

Redemption rate: 1 CashPoint = ₹0.25 for Flights/Hotels via SmartBuy, 1 CashPoint = ₹0.25 for Product Catalogue, 1 CashPoint = ₹0.20 for statement cashback. A standard redemption fee of ₹99 + GST applies (₹50 + GST for statement cashback). CashPoints cannot be transferred to partner airlines or hotel loyalty programs.
